# GitHub AI PM — Python dependencies
# These are the ONLY packages needed. All GitHub/Claude API calls
# use Python's built-in urllib — no extra HTTP library required.

# No external packages needed!
# All scripts use Python stdlib only:
#   urllib.request  — HTTP calls to GitHub API and Claude API
#   json            — JSON parsing
#   os              — Environment variables
#   datetime        — Date calculations
#   sys             — Script routing

# This file exists so GitHub Actions can cache dependencies.
# If you add any pip packages, list them here.
